title: Cisco ASA Firewall Log Generator
description: Generates sample Cisco Secure Firewall ASA syslog messages in the standard %ASA-<severity>-<msgid>: format. Covers connection built/teardown (302013/302014/302015/302016), ACL deny (106023), ACL permit (106100), port-based block (710003), VPN session (113039/113019), and AAA failed auth (113005) log families. Approximately 40% of events represent security control actions (deny/block/failed auth).

generate_cisco_asa_logs.name: generate_cisco_asa_logs
generate_cisco_asa_logs.description: Builds sample Cisco ASA syslog messages covering TCP/UDP connection events, ACL permit/deny, port block, VPN session lifecycle, and AAA auth failure message families as documented in the Cisco Secure Firewall ASA Series Syslog Messages guide.

ingest_logs_to_grail.name: ingest_logs_to_grail
ingest_logs_to_grail.description: Sends each generated Cisco ASA syslog entry to the Dynatrace Log Ingest API v2 with normalized attributes using the cisco.* prefix.

analyze_cisco_asa_logs.name: analyze_cisco_asa_logs
analyze_cisco_asa_logs.description: Produces a breakdown of Cisco ASA events by message ID, action, and traffic type to validate realistic data distribution.
